titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 39: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 39. (A.R. No. 63 of 1905.) ĀṈAIMALAI, MADURAI TALUK, MADURAI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a rock at the entrance into the central shrine in the Narasiṅgapperumāḷ temple.

p.hi: M.K. Parakēsarivarman (Parāntaka I) Year 33 Aslēsha, Kaṟkaṭaka, Friday, 939 A.D. July 19.

summary.p: This inscription is in vaṭṭeḻutu characters. It records an agreement given by the members of the assembly of Narasiṅga-maṅgalam, a brahmadēya and a dēvadāna included in the Kiḻ-Iraṇiyamuṭṭam, to Marudūr-uḍaiyāṉ Aruṇidi Kaliyaṉ of Marudūr in Puṟaṅkaṟambai-nāḍu, an official of the Chōḷa king. The temple of Narasiṅgapperumāṉaḍigaḷ of Tiruvāṉaimalai had to remit 18 īḻakkāśu to the sabhā on account of taxes on its land. To realize a part of this amount, six īḻakkāśu, fifteen īḻakkāśu had been deposited by the official with the sabhaiyār. To meet the balance of twelve īḻakkāśu, the above official (again) deposited tax-money (Iṟaikkāval) and obtained the possession of the land (with a tank therein) called Ūruḍaiyāṉkuḷam alias Kaliyaṉēri with the right to utilize the water. He then purchased two vēli of land adjacent to the tank. The produce 300 kalam of paddy from this (plot of) land were to be utilized, half ie 150 kalam for providing food offerings to the god thrice a day and the other half to feed five brāhmaṇas wellversed in vēdas, commencing from the day of solar eclipse in the month of Kaṟkaṭaka on Friday when the star Aslēsha was current. It is mentioned that the śrīkāriyam (the temple official), Tiruvāyppāḍi-Nārāyaṇaṉ and the members of the above assembly gave an undertaking to conduct this feeding ceremony without fail. They also agreed to remit a fine of two kāśu daily if they failed to carry out this charity. Other details relating to the fines are given.
Published in S.I.I. Vol. III No. 106.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matiraikoṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu muppattu muṉṟāvatu Ivvāṇṭu tevatāṉaṅ kiḻiraṇiya muṭṭattuppaṭum pi
rammateyam naraciṅkamaṅkalattuc cavaiyo(m)ñ coḻap perumāṉaṭikaḷatikārikaḷ coḻanāṭṭup puṟaṅkarampai ṉāṭ
ṭu marutūr marutūruṭaiyāṉaruṇiti kaliyaṉukku Oṭṭik kuṭuttaRead kuṭutta paricāvatu paricāvatu . Eṅkaḷūrt tiruvāṉaimalai naraciṅkapperumāṉaṭikaḷ ta
mmuṭaiya nilattālc cavaiyomukku Āṇṭeṭuttu Iṭakkaṭava Īḻakkācu patiṉeṭṭu Ikkācu pataṉeṭṭilumRead patiṉeṭṭilummuṉṟat toṉṟu Ī
ḻakkācu Āṟu Ivvāṟu Īḻakkācukkum palicaiyākac cavaiyār kaiyvaḻi kuṭutta Īḻakkācu patiṉaiṉtu patiṉaiñciṉālum vanta pali
caiyāvatu Īḻakkāciṉ vāyt tiṅkaḷ kāṟ puttakkamāka Oro tiṅkaḷāl vanta puttakka muṉṟe mukkāl muṉṟe mukkālu Orāṇṭu panniraṇṭu ti
ñkaḷāl vanta puttakkam nāṟpattaiñcuṉāloru Īḻakkācukkup puttakkam Ēḻarai Āka Īḻakkācu Āṟu Ivvāṟu Īḻa
kkācum Iṟai nikkit tevar cavaiyārkku Iṭakkaṭava 10 2 paṉṉiraṇṭum nikki Atikārikaḷ marutūruṭaiyāṉ Aruṇiti kaliyaṉ Iṟaikāvalāka kātta
kāciṉāl vanta nilaṉ Ūruṭaiyāṉkuḷamāṉa kaliyaṉeriyum Ikkuḷantāmeṇṭumāṟu kallik karai niḷam Aṭṭappeṟuvatākavum I
kkuḷaṅkarai Ucara Aṭṭappeṟuvatākavum Ikkuḷatti ṉir tāṉ veṇṭu Aḷavuṅ kokkappeṟuvatākavu mikkuḷam Itiṉkiḻ nir nilaṉiruve
liyu marutūruṭaiyāṉaruṇiti kaliyaṉ vilaikkuk koṇṭu Ikkuḷattiṉ kiḻ nīrnilaṉiru veliyiṉāl vanta pokam Aññāḻikkālāl nellu 3 100 kalam
Ivaiyiṟṟiṉ pāti 100 5 10 nelluṅ koṇṭu Ivarkku muṉṟu cantiyun tiruvamirtu cevatākavum niṉṟa 1[5 10] nelluṅkoṇṭu tiruvamirtu U
ttama Akkiramāt tevar Amitu ceyyumpoḻutu vetappirāmaṇar nicatam Ayvar Amitu ceyvatākavum vaccapaṭi patteṭṭukkuttal Oruvaṉu
kku Arici Iru nāḻiyuṅ kaṟi muṉṟum tayir nāḻiyum neyiru ceviṭum kāyyilai Iraṇṭum tālamañcum vaṭṭilaiñcum Oṭṭuṭṭi Oṉṟu
m caṭṭuvam Oṉṟu Aṭuvā(ṉ*) ṉoruvaṉukku nicati nellu Aññāḻi Aṟu tiṅkaḷoru puṭavai vaiccu Ipparicu Ik kalamuṭṭuvatāka Iv
vvāṭṭai kaṟkaṭakanāyiṟṟu veḷḷikkiḻamai peṟṟa Āyileyattiṉāṉṟu cū(ṟ)ṟiyakkiraṇavelaik kuraikirāṇam paṟṟiṉa Aṉṟu mutalāka
Ipparicey Ūṭṭuvatāka niṉṟu ciṟiyakāṟiyamārāykiṉṟacirikāriya tiruvāyppāṭi nārāyaṇaṉum Ivvūrccavaiyārum Ipparicey Akkiramuṭṭāmey cantirā
tittavalamRead tittavalŪṭṭuvippomāṉom tiruvāṉaimalai naraciṅkap perumāṉaṭikaḷukku cirikācciyaRead cirikāriyam ārāyvārumĀrāyvārum cavayomumcapaiyomum Itiṟṟirampiṉomaic cavaiycapaiyārum
yālum cirikā(ṟ)ṟiyamārāyvāṉunRead cirikāriyatiṟamiṉāṉ nicati Iṟuiru kācukācu Aṉṟāḻ koviṉukkut taṇṭampaṭṭu Akkācu koṇṭu tevarkkut tiruviḷakku Erivatākavum cavaiyār
t tiṟampil Āṟukācu taṇṭappaṭuvatākavum Oṭṭik kuṭuttom cavaiyomum cirikācciyamārāyvāṉumRead cirikāriyamarutūruṭaiyāṉaruṇiti kaliyaṉukku Ittaṇṭamiṟu
ttu mittaṉmam muṭṭāme Ayvaraiyum cantirāticcar Uḷḷaḷavum Ūṭṭuvippomāṉoñ cavaiyyumcapaiyumcirikārcciyamRead cirikāriyaĀrāyum vayiṣṇavarum . Itaṉ
mam rakṣittāṉA few words are found missing.
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 39 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
